tasks.label: MINS: build
args: source /opt/ros/${env:ROS_DISTRO}/setup.bash && if [ "${env:ROS_DISTRO}" = "humble" ]; then bash ${workspaceFolder}/build_ros2.sh; else catkin build --workspace /workspaces; fi

tasks.label: MINS: clean build
args: source /opt/ros/${env:ROS_DISTRO}/setup.bash && if [ "${env:ROS_DISTRO}" = "humble" ]; then rm -rf /workspaces/build /workspaces/install /workspaces/log && bash ${workspaceFolder}/build_ros2.sh; else catkin clean --yes --workspace /workspaces && catkin build --workspace /workspaces; fi

tasks.label: MINS: headless simulation smoke test
args: source /opt/ros/${env:ROS_DISTRO}/setup.bash && if [ "${env:ROS_DISTRO}" = "humble" ]; then source /workspaces/install/setup.bash && cfg=/workspaces/install/mins/share/mins/config/simulation/config.yaml && timeout 600 ros2 run mins simulation "$cfg"; else source /workspaces/devel/setup.bash && mkdir -p /tmp/mins-simulation && timeout 600 roslaunch mins simulation.launch sys_verbosity:=3 sys_path_state:=/tmp/mins-simulation/0/ sys_path_timing:=/tmp/mins-simulation/0.time sys_path_trajectory:=/tmp/mins-simulation/0.txt; fi
